description_long: This water cooler features a tall, rectangular black base with a large, faceted blue water bottle mounted on top. The base has a slightly recessed front panel with two visible spouts, each accompanied by a small button or lever for dispensing water. The blue bottle is polygonal and robust, suggesting a high-capacity design typical of office or public space water coolers. The overall structure is utilitarian, with clean lines and a functional appearance, suitable for urban environments such as offices, parks, or public waiting areas. The materials appear to be primarily plastic, with the bottle likely made of translucent or opaque blue plastic and the base constructed from a sturdy, matte-finished black plastic. No visible branding or cup holder attachments are present, and the design is minimalistic, focusing on ease of use and durability.
description: A tall, black water cooler with a large, faceted blue bottle on top and two dispensing spouts on the front panel. The design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for public or office spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue bottle, black base, and two dispensing spouts with buttons on the recessed panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid black base and the blue bottle, with no visible spouts or controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the black base and blue bottle, with no interactive features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain side of the base and bottle.
attribute_control_panel_design: Two push buttons above two spouts on a recessed front panel, no digital display or indicators.
